provenance.note: SELF-GENERATED regression fixture (NOT an external oracle): produced by hartree itself (round 10) to pin the B97-3c composite against drift. Geometries from tests/ref/geometries.json (bohr).

engines.scf: hartree RKS gga_xc_b97_3c (xcx, libxc 327 convention), def2-mTZVP (mTZVP, vendored from the Psi4 distribution), grid 3
engines.d3: hartree D3(BJ)-ATM, b97-3c parameters (s6=1, s8=1.50, a1=0.37, a2=4.10, s9=1; ATM zero damping alp=16, rs9=4/3 over D3 cutoff radii, simple-dftd3 convention)
engines.srb: hartree SRB, B97-3c parameters (gamma=10, s=0.08, E=-s*sum sqrt(ZA*ZB)*exp(-gamma*R/R0AB) over the D3 cutoff radii; mctc-gcp srb_egrad2 convention, 30 bohr cutoff)

provenance.method: B97-3c: refitted B97 GGA/mTZVP + D3(BJ)-ATM + SRB (no gCP); Brandenburg, Bannwarth, Hansen, Grimme, J. Chem. Phys. 148, 064104 (2018)

bare_functional.note: plain gga_xc_b97_3c/def2-mTZVP grid-3 SCF, no corrections (functional-wiring sanity pin)
